aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a solid foundation but lacks the structured content and authority signals needed for AI assistants to prioritize them in search results.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to highlight common customer queries and solutions.
Add LocalBusiness schema to improve local search visibility.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-maintained with essential information but could benefit from more regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No emphasis on LocalBusiness schema properties (e.g., openingHours, address)

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to equipment rental, tool availability, and emergency services.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and industry expertise to position the business as a leader.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for the assistants powering tomorrow's searches.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI-assisted searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is strong, but AI models overlook them due to a lack of structured data and conversational content.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to make your business the top choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI; the longer you wait, the more ground you lose.

email_subject_line: Dominate AI Search: Your Path to 40% More Leads
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and found significant opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI-driven searches.
